case_title: INOCENCIO URBANO FELIZ VS. MAXIMA RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 SERVED JAN-23-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MAXIMA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2015 BY QUEENA HO. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER - SANDRA TAKHAR. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER RAUL BEGUIRISAIN. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELIZ, INOCENCIO URBANO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MAXIMA $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $780.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MAXIMA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY FELIZ, INOCENCIO URBANO AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MAXIMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
